text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day after the Tracen Meet. For the first time ever, Vodka
doesn't show up for training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, you're Vodka's trainer, right? Don't tell me... has she not
shown up?
choice_data_list: Do you know where she might be?
Do you know where she might be?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, she's probably at the riverbank. Ever since she read this one
manga, she's all, "if I'm gonna be brooding, it has to be by a
riverbank."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She always talks about how cool it is... Heh, what a dummy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I might have my complaints about her, but I'm not my best self when
she's not around... So please, bring her back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After thanking Daiwa Scarlet, I hurry to the riverbank.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh... 'Sup, Trainer.
choice_data_list: It's time for training, you know?
It's time for training, you know?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I know that already. I'm skipping today—no buts!
choice_data_list: Didn't you say skipping practice was lame?
Didn't you say skipping practice was lame?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ughhh, shut up already! Get lost—just leave me alone!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Leave someone as... lame as me alone!
choice_data_list: Why do you think you're lame?
Why do you think you're lame?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I thought I had it in me. I was really goin' all out—I was gonna be the
rising star that took down Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But... when we started actually running, I could feel the huge gap
between us. I felt like I was gonna pass out halfway through!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I thought to myself, "I can't do it."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But those racers I grew up watching... the ones in the Derby—not a
single one of them ever gave up!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer... am I just no good?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: If this is how I am pre-debut, then how am I ever gonna be cool?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's obvious that Vodka is losing her confidence. How can I cheer her
up?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I might have my complaints about her, but I'm not my best self when
she's not around... So please, bring her back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, why did Daiwa Scarlet say that to me? Maybe she
wanted to tell Vodka something...
choice_data_list: Let's head back to the track for now, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? No, like I said—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stop pushin' me! What're you doin'?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff... Ah, it's Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Why are you here? You told me you wanted to take a break after the
Meet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I changed my schedule. You have a problem with that?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's all because some dummy decided to go up against the big
leagues... Yet despite her opponent's breakneck pace, she kept up
just fine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And she even accelerated during the straightaways... Made me think,
"I can't let myself be left behind."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet, you...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I need to get back to training now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The hell is she talkin' about? Lookin' up to me like that... Meanwhile,
I... I'm here being super lame!
choice_data_list:
It doesn't change the fact that you tried. That's
already cool.

It doesn't change the fact that you tried. That's
already cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah... but I gave up in the middle!
choice_data_list:
We can't change the past. What we can do,
though, is focus on the future.

We can't change the past. What we can do,
though, is focus on the future.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The future?
choice_data_list:
It's up to you whether you wanna stay lame like
this, or overcome it.

It's up to you whether you wanna stay lame like
this, or overcome it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Up... to me... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I got a favor to ask!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Please... help me redeem myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Since then, Vodka has had a resurgence of focus and motivation.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: There you are, Scarlet! C'mon, let's race!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? I can't, I already have plans—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat the small stuff! C'mon, it's just one lap! You ready? Here
we go!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait! Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Lookin' forward to it, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Bring it on. I'll make you regret it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has decided to challenge Narita Brian to a one-on-one
rematch!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uuurgh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (Holy craaaap! She's fast! How the hell am I supposed to catch up?)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (But I...)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Arghhh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (I won't give up! Not ever again!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (I'll do whatever it takes to be cool!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, Narita Brian wins the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the overwhelming difference in skill, Vodka musters every
ounce of her strength to chase after the formidable "beast."

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Not bad. Let's do this again.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh! Th-thank you so much, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Hehe, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be even cooler from now on, so watch carefully—'cause ya
won't wanna miss it!
